articles.title: Report: Flag football game featuring Tom Brady moved out of Saudi Arabia
articles.description:
As tensions rise in the Middle East, Brady's gridiron return will happen in Los Angeles instead of Riyadh.

The post Report: Flag football game featuring Tom Brady moved out of Saudi Arabia appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Tom Brady's flag football game relocated to Los Angeles due to Middle East tensions.
The event was originally scheduled for Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
Boston fans miss a chance to see Brady play in an international setting.

articles.title: Why this Boston Marathon qualifier is running for the American Heart Association

articles.title: Cohasset man charged after allegedly shooting family dog while hunting coyotes from his window

summary: Uno Pizzeria in Revere has reopened after renovations, restoring local dining options.

articles.title: Mass. business confidence turns positive for the first time in a year
articles.description:
The index climbed into an optimistic range as AI and earnings gains took hold, but before uncertainty tied to the Middle East conflict began.

summary: Massachusetts business confidence index turns positive for the first time in a year.
